'''Yang Wood Tiger''' is the 51st of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 甲 Kinoe (yang wood, the gaia-aligned face of spring), and its branch is 寅 Tora, the [[Tiger (zodiac)|Tiger]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, both stem and branch share the wood element, doubling its weight in this node.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Water Ox]] (node 50) and [[Yin Wood Rabbit]] (node 52).

== Folk reading ==
Yang Wood Tiger is sometimes called the '''Tiger Calamity''' — a disaster-year distinct from the Pig's underworld stirrings, marked by sudden earthquakes rather than slow ruptures from below.

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kinoe (甲)]] — yang wood
* '''Branch:''' [[Tiger (zodiac)|Tiger (寅)]] — yang wood
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' spring

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Water Ox]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Wood Rabbit]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q904409}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
